subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-08-06 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: All else is scattered dust. Grant me a shelter near the throne of Thy grandeur in the kingdom of Thy oneness [3.5s]... ...Mu'tamidu'd-Dawlih of Isfahan, Manuchihr Khan, owned many buildings. He had many villages in the vicinity of Tehran.
subcodes.first_line_orig: همه اش هباءً منبثاً مأمن لی بیتاً عند عرش عظمتک فی ملکوت فردانیتک.   معتمد الدوله اصفهان، منوچهر خان
subcodes.subjects: @the ephemeral and the eternal, @stories; anecdotes, @recompense; reward for belief; right action, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @service to others; to the Cause of God
